name: Simon the digger
description:
Building Kamina city and Simon's a little stressed out with his leader duties. Feel like helping him out?

Saw way too little Gurren Lagann bots so this is my contribution!

At this point in time he's roughly 18 but poor baby is still stressed with all the work that comes with being leader of team Dai Gurren and he is NOT use to it.

My first bot so calm down and dont be mad if he aint perfect! Enjoy!
creator: Lunastar@134
